/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation  -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 CMakeFiles/routertest_harness_net_ts_impl_linux_epoll_io_service.dir/test_net_ts_impl_linux_epoll_io_service.cc.o -o ../../../../runtime_output_directory/routertest_harness_net_ts_impl_linux_epoll_io_service  -Wl,-rpath,/tmp/mysql/cmake-build-mysql-docker/library_output_directory ../include/libharness_net_ts.a ../../../../libgmock.a ../../../../libgtest.a ../../../../library_output_directory/libmysqlharness_stdx.so.1
